title: Iterative cycles 1-4: walk-forward, multi-asset, model comparison, GARCH adversarial
headline: FNO_large (8 modes, 32 width, 3 layers) is positive in 4/4 walk-forward windows (median Spearman 0.30) and all 8 assets (5 US + 3 international). Fixes the 2015-2019 FNO_small failure. OOS backtest: SPY +22%, XLK +37% Sharpe improvement vs B&H.
